report_name: RISK-06/RISK-07 r4 prelaunch host-identity fail-closed audit

failed_invariant.name: fallback_host_scientific_identity
failed_invariant.observed: all four host tasks use graph.type=hybrid and expect best_summary_hybrid.json
failed_invariant.required: host tasks use graph.type=adaptive with learned graph.p1 and expect best_summary_adaptive.json
failed_invariant.reason: The paper defines the host proposal as softmax(p1), and the E1/R12 trace binds the designated host to AdaptiveWise. HybridWise has no learned p1, so it is not the fallback-core identity used by proposal_adaptive at gate zero.
failed_invariant.root_cause: scripts/aaai27_adapters/pilot_adapters.py hard-coded hybrid for the pilot host while queue validation checked only the dataset/arm matrix and did not validate graph identity or summary identity.

disposition.successor_requirement: Use a new committed immutable source archive and a never-used dated queue root after the host-identity regression, manifest validator, and final-revision no-training smoke pass.

claim_boundary: This audit establishes a prelaunch manifest identity failure and zero training only. It is not a model result, an efficacy observation, or a RISK-08 input.
